data.name: Nao's Love Triangle: Hentai Puzzle 18+
data.detailed_description:
«Nao’s Love Triangle: Hentai Puzzle 18+» is a puzzle game in which the player has to collect images of girls by rotating the puzzle pieces, in parallel following the relationships of the three heroines.

The game tells the love story of Nao’s, who find herself in the middle of two girls Miyuki and Kaede. Nao is a very lovable and outgoing girl, because of this she has a hard time building relationships. She likes girls and doesn’t mind having a good time. ♡(´｡• ᵕ •｡) ♡

The game is built around progressing through levels in stages. Starting with more closed clothing, the player unlocks increasingly nude pictures off the girl. As you progress through the game, the girl flirts with you, making pleasant sounds. Also in the gallery you can activate the girl’s moans.(*^.^*)


Game Features:
  • Hand drawn artwork
  • Art animations
  • Heroine voice acting
  • Superpowers: explosion and aim
  • Gallery

Characherts

Nao

Nao is a general practitioner, she graduated with honors and because of that she didn’t have a boyfriend. In her free time she likes to read and drink coffe in coffe shops. She is quite gentle, but she likes to be on top more. She will take charge of the situation and you can enjoy the encounter.


Miyuki

A loveable girl who never turns down an adventure. She works as a model and has a fairly popular channel in a friend portal. She likes to be dominated. Will ask to be on top <3


Kaede

Kaede is a tattoo artist who also enjoys sketching. She can be cold and doesn’t look very interested, but when it comes to drawings or love interests, fires light up in her eyes. Likes to dominate, wants to hear you moan <3

data.short_description: «Nao’s Love Triangle: Hentai Puzzle 18+» is a puzzle game in which the player has to collect images of girls by rotating the puzzle pieces, in parallel following the relationships of the three heroines.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 德文*, 簡體中文*, 俄文*, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Dual-Core Intel i5 CPU @ 2GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel 4xxx Series w/ 512MB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i7 CPU @ 2.6GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GTX 555 w/ 1GB VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i5 @ 2.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 5000
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.9.3
  • 處理器: Core i7 @ 2.7GHz+
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated standalone GPU w/ 1GB+ VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
